title: syntax error in the SMT-LIBv2 output generated by write_smt2

features.name: ternary operator with reduction operator result
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where one branch is a reduction operator result applied to a multi-bit signal

features.name: signed input with ternary and reduction in formal flow
features.description: Code should include signed inputs of different widths used with reduction operators in ternary expressions within a formal verification flow
